text:
If a wave with no warning is familiar, this grief pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Name one specific memory out loud, place a hand on your chest. And let the wave pass without rushing it. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Grief is love with nowhere left to go, not a problem waiting to be solved.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on grief (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
